Name:

(Beat 4)
Notes: Remix of Kanye's 4th beat from his 1997 beat tape, by Made Men from their Classic Limited Edition album.

Notes: Remix of the Beanie Sigel song "The Truth", produced by Kanye.

Notes: Freestyle from Funk Flex in 2012 over a Kanye-produced beat.

Name:
Young Thug - J.B.S. Freestyle
(This Can't Be Life)
Notes: 2013 freestyle over the song "This Can't Be Life" by JAY-Z and Beanie Sigel, produced by Kanye West.

(This Can't Be Life)
Notes: Remix of the song "This Can't Be Life" by JAY-Z and Beanie Sigel from Lil B's 2012 Obama BasedGod mixtape.

(Izzo (H.O.V.A.))
Notes: Freestyle over the JAY-Z song "Izzo (H.O.V.A.)", produced by Kanye West.

Name:
J Dilla - We F'ed Up 
(feat. Frank-N-Dank) 
(Takeover)
Notes: J Dilla song off the leaked 2003 album Pay Jay. Instrumental is an early version of "Takeover" by JAY-Z with a The Doors sample. Not 100% a remix on its own, but he officially recognized it on his blog in 2008, making it unique as an unofficial remix over an unreleased version of an instrumental cosigned by Ye himself.

Name: KXNG Crooked - Takeover
Notes: Remix of the Kanye-produced JAY-Z song of the same name from the mixtape Hip Hop Weekly Vol. 3.

Name:
Jay Rock - The Takeover
(Takeover)
Notes: Remix of the Kanye-produced JAY-Z song "Takeover" from the 2009 mixtape No Mask On.

Name:

(feat. DJ Khaled) 
(Takeover)
Notes: Remix of the Kanye-produced JAY-Z song "Takeover" from the 2020 mixtape No Ceilings 3.

Name: Clipse & Re-Up Gang - Stay From Around Me

Notes: Remix of "30 Hours" posted by Juice WRLD to his Soundcloud page from his Juiced Up EP.

Name:
OG Maco - 30 Hours For Pablo Dylan
(30 Hours)
Notes: Remix of "30 Hours" by OG Maco.

Name:
Freddie Gibbs - Cocaine Parties In LA
(No More Parties In LA)
Notes: Remix/potential OG version of "No More Parties In LA" by Freddie Gibbs. Posted to Freddie's SoundCloud, only to have DefJam remove it hours later. Madlib said that he didn't know if it was a freestyle because he didn't know who recorded it first; the "No More Parties In LA" beat was originally intended for Bandana. Was briefly added to streaming services in 2021.

Name: Fade [Yeezy Season 3 Version]
Notes: Remix combining elements of V1 and V2.

Name: Fade [Bootleg Radio Edit]
Notes: An official remix that was released through Def Jam's website.

Name:
Saint Pablo 
(WondaGurl & Daxz Remix)
Notes: Remix of "Saint Pablo" by WondaGurl and Daxz. Posted on SoundCloud initially but later deleted. Also posted by HotNewHipHop and Fader.

Name:
Jadakiss & Nino Man - Block Style
(Pop Style)
Notes: Remix of "Pop Style", a song rumored to have been originally made for Wolves, by Jadakiss & Nino Man.

Name: K.A.A.N. - Pop Style
Notes: Remix of "Pop Style", a song rumored to have been originally made for Wolves, by K.A.A.N.

Name: ScHoolBoy Q - THat Part (Black Hippy Remix)
Notes: Remix of "THat Part" by ScHoolboy Q & Kanye that adds Ab-Soul, Jay Rock & Kendrick Lamar. Kanye's verse is absent.

Name: Big K.R.I.T. - THat Part
Notes: Remix of "THat Part" by Big K.R.I.T. from his 12 for 12 mixtape.

Name: 070 Shake - Champions
Notes: Unreleased remix of "Champions" by 070 Shake. Leaked in 2019.

Name: Teyana Taylor - Champions
Notes: Remix of "Champions" by Teyana Taylor. Not on streaming services. Teyana raps over Big Sean's part; Sean's ad-libs are still audible in the background.

Name:
Caiden the Crownholder - Cops Shot The Kid
(feat. Consequence)
Notes: Has some Consequence adlibs. Also has a Music Video.

Name: Smokepurpp - Lift Yourself (PurppYe)
Notes:
OG Filename: purppye
Humorous, tongue-in-cheek remix of "Lift Yourself" by Smokepurpp. A lyrical non sequitur similar to the original song. Tweeted out by Kanye on April 28th with the message "I'm posting this but not as a diss to J Cole. I love J Cole. I also love where Purp took his flow."

Name:
Ruff Swami (Squalay) - WATCH YOURSELF
(Lift Yourself)
Notes: Remix of "Lift Yourself" by Ruff Swami aka Squalay. Squalay is mostly known for recreating albums with his own voice.

Name: Virgil Abloh - Lift Yourself (Circoloco Club Edit)
Notes: Virgil Abloh's Circoloco Club edit of "Lift Yourself".

Name:
USHER - Choosing Me
(I Thought About Killing You)
Notes: Leaked USHER song that remixes "I Thought About Killing You" for the beat. Originally recorded from an Alek voice chat, where a misconception that the snippet was of The Weeknd came around, but was disproved after the song leaked.

Name:
William Crooks - knowiknowiknowiknowiknow
(I Thought About Killing You)
Notes: Remix of "I Thought About Killing You" by William Crooks. Surfaced on dbree as "Sean Leon - I Know", was later figured out that William Crooks made it.

Name:
Yikes (Dyro Bootleg)
(prod. Dyro)
Notes: Remix of "Yikes" by Dutch DJ and EDM producer Dyro.

Name: August Alsina - Wouldn't Leave
Notes: Remix of "Wouldn't Leave" by R&B singer, August Alsina.

Name: BADBADNOTGOOD - Ghost Town
Notes: Remix of "Ghost Town" by BADBADNOTGOOD. Was played at the Louis Vuitton Men's Spring-Summer 2019 Fashion Show, when Kanye and Virgil Abloh famously embraced.

Name: Justice Der - Ghost Town
Notes: Instrumental jazz remix of "Ghost Town" by guitarist Justice Der from his album Favorites 2.

Name: SAYGRACE - Violent Crimes
Notes: Live cover of "Violent Crimes" by Australian singer SAYGRACE. She does both the Kanye and 070 Shake parts, although she censors Kanye's part.

Name:
Tyler, The Creator - CRUST IN THEIR EYES
(KIDS SEE GHOSTS)
Notes: Remix of "KIDS SEE GHOSTS" uploaded by Tyler, The Creator to his Twitter and YouTube. Features a few background vocals from Frank Ocean.

Name:
6ix9ine - KANGA (Atour Remix)
(feat. Kanye West)
Notes: Some weird unreleased remix of Kanga by some producer named Atour.

Name:
Lil B - Please Talk Interlude
(Cuban Link)
Notes: Lil B song that remixes using the Cuban Link leak instrumental.

Name:
Meek Mill - Law Of Attraction
(feat. Ant Clemons)
Notes: Snippet previewed on Meek Mill's Instagram story on the day JESUS IS KING was released

Name:
Law Of Attraction
(feat. Nino Blu)
Notes: Remix of "Law Of Attraction" by Nino Blu. Nino released it saying it was a ref track, but that was later disproven.

Name:
Jarreau Vandal - Sunday Service VANDALIZED
(feat. Denzel Curry)
(Lift Your Voices, This is The Day)
Notes: Producer Jarreau Vandal flips the viral "Lift Your Voices" Sunday Service clip into an instrumental. Denzel Curry adds an original verse.

Name: Charley van Veldhoven - Every Hour
Notes: Piano version of "Every Hour" by pianist Charley van Veldhoven.

Name: Bright Campa - Follow God
Notes: Remix of "Follow God" by rapper Bright Campa from his album Energy.

Name:
Chris Church - FOLLOW
(Follow God)
Notes: "Follow God" remix by Christian rapper Chris Church released as part of his #VERSESUNDAYS series.

Name:
Consequence - Cons on Sunday
(Closed On Sunday)
Notes: Remix of "Closed On Sunday" uploaded by Consequence after teasing it multiple times on his Instagram Live.

Name: Kid Rohan - Closed On Sunday
Notes: "Closed On Sunday" remix by rapper Kid Rohan.

Name: Charley van Veldhoven - Closed On Sunday
Notes: Piano version of "Closed On Sunday" by pianist Charley van Veldhoven.

Name: First to Eleven - Closed On Sunday
Notes: Rock cover of "Closed On Sunday" by the popular band First To Eleven.

Name: Hassan Khaffaf - Glory
Notes: Remix of "Glory" done by Hassan Khaffaf.

Name: The Worshicken - Closed On Sunday
Notes: Cover of "Closed On Sunday" performed by a group of rubber chickens that refer to themselves as The Worshicken.

Name: Netsky - Water [Drum and Bass Remix]
Notes: Remix posted by Belgian producer, Netsky, to his official Dropbox. It was posted only for 24 hours and has since been removed.

Name: Charley van Veldhoven - Water
Notes: Piano version of "Water" by pianist Charley van Veldhoven.

Name: Charley van Veldhoven - God Is
Notes: Piano version of "God Is" by pianist Charley van Veldhoven.

Name:
Glory 
(feat. Hassan Khaffaf)
Notes: Remix of the unreleased song "Glory" by Hassan Khaffaf, an artist signed to Dame Dash. Hassan raps over a chopped up version of the beat for the second verse of the song.

Era: JESUS IS KING: The Dr. Dre Version
Name:
JESUS IS KING: The Dr. Dre Version
(prod. Dr. Dre)
Notes: An unreleased remix album of JESUS IS KING prod. Dr. Dre. Also contains songs cut from the original version of JIK.

Name:
Nah Nah Nah (Remix)
(feat. DaBaby and 2 Chainz)
Notes: Official remix on streaming services featuring DaBaby and 2 Chainz.

Name:
Nah Nah Nah (Sirius XM Remix)
(feat. DaBaby and 2 Chainz)
("Nah Nah Nah" Minions Remix)
Notes: Remix previewed on Sirius XM on November 11, 2020, recorded by u/pepperonicalzone. Instrumental built on a sample of Steam's "Na Na Hey Hey Kiss Him Goodbye". Currently unknown if this is an official rework or a DJ edit.

Name: Caiden the Crownholder - Nah Nah Nah
Notes: Remix of "Nah Nah Nah" by the son of Consequence and the Rap God, Caiden.

Name: Conway the Machine - Jail Freestyle
Notes: Freestyle by Conway over the "Jail" beat. Was recorded after Donda released. From his 2022 Greetings Earthlings mixtape.

Name: Lil Gnar - Hurricane Freestyle
Notes: Remix of "Hurricane" by Lil Gnar. Features The Weeknd's chorus before switching to a remake of the OG instrumental.

Name: Alicia Keys - No Child Left Behind
Notes: Cover of "No Child Left Behind" performed during her "LALA" music video shoot.

Name: BabySantana - No Child Left Behind
Notes: Cover of "No Child Left Behind" done by BabySantana.

Name: The Weeknd - Hurricane
Notes: Live rendition of "Hurricane". Features only The Weeknd's hook and added live production.

Name: Al Be Back - Diet Coke (Remix)
Notes: A remix by Al Be Back over the "Diet Coke" beat.

Name: Alicia Keys - City of Gods (Part II)
Notes: Second part of "City Of Gods". Kanye has nothing to do with this song, making it essentially serve as a remix of the original song with more Alicia Keys and no Fivio Foreign or Kanye.

Name: Bishop Nehru - EAZY Freestyle
Notes: Freestyle by Bishop Nehru over the "Eazy" beat.

Name: Boys Noize - Get Lost
Notes: Remix of "Get Lost" by DJ and producer Boys Noize.

Name:
Digga D - Fighting For My Soul
(prod. Joe Stanley & GX)
(530, Dear Summer)
Notes: Song by Digga D that uses a remixed version of the "530" beat. From his Back To Square One album.

Name:
VULTURES - Havoc Version
(feat. Lil Durk & Bump J) (prod. Havoc & The Legendary Traxster)
Notes: Official remix for the track "Vultures" done by Havoc and posted by Kanye on his Instagram. The Bump J extra adlib was on the non-streaming version but re-added just for this version. The music video is entirely AI generated and produced by Jon Rafman.
Artist(s):
Kanye West
Ty Dolla $ign
Bump J
Lil Durk
Havoc

Name:
KayCyy - I MISS YE
(CAN'T HURRY LOVE)
Notes: Cover/Remix of "CAN'T HURRY LOVE" done by KayCyy. Fooled some people into thinking it was a ref when he played it on stream until it was officially released a day later.

Name:
ALIVE (PRODYSGROUP REMIX)
(feat. YoungBoy Never Broke Again & DJ Swamp Izzo) (prod. PRODYSGROUP)
Notes:
OG Filename: ALIVE  052225 APPROVED FINAL
Remix by PRODYSGROUP released exclusively on Scrybe. Described as "ass" by PRODYSGROUP himself.
